form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on March 4 over 1000m, 8 len behind Snow Prince with 56kg at $71. The race before that 6th of 10 at Mt Barker Rtg 58+ on February 8 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Prince with 58kg at $12. Can be in the finish with the blinkers being reapplied.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9). Returns from a 33-day let-up. Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on March 4 over 1000m, 8 len behind Snow Prince with 56kg at $71. The race before that 6th of 10 at Mt Barker Rtg 58+ on February 8 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Prince with 58kg at $12. Can be in the finish with the blinkers being reapplied.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently favourite; won by a nose at this track March 15 over 1100m defeating I'm Eugene carrying 59.5kg at $3.50. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Stony Creek Bm56 on January 18 over 1000m, on a slow track; nose behind Juice Box with 61.5kg at $3. Needs some luck from the draw but is good enough if the breaks come.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Recent form sound. Most recently favourite; won by a nose at this track March 15 over 1100m defeating I'm Eugene carrying 59.5kg at $3.50. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Stony Creek Bm56 on January 18 over 1000m, on a slow track; nose behind Juice Box with 61.5kg at $3. Needs some luck from the draw but is good enough if the breaks come.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.
Raced three-wide until settling outside the leader near the 500m.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 30-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at Bunbury Westspeed Plat on March 7 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind Fantaxtic with 54kg at $26. The run before that 5th of 9 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Good Vibes with 56.5kg at $6.50. Racing well without winning and can feature in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Comes here off a 30-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at Bunbury Westspeed Plat on March 7 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind Fantaxtic with 54kg at $26. The run before that 5th of 9 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Good Vibes with 56.5kg at $6.50. Racing well without winning and can feature in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Taken back behind runners shortly after the start from a wide barrier.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Port Hedland Rtg 56+ August 3 over 1200m, 13 len behind Star Power carrying 54kg at $2.25. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at this track May 15 over 1100m, 12 len behind Maidmy Way with 56kg at $4. Will improve on whatever she does in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). First-up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Port Hedland Rtg 56+ August 3 over 1200m, 13 len behind Star Power carrying 54kg at $2.25. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at this track May 15 over 1100m, 12 len behind Maidmy Way with 56kg at $4. Will improve on whatever she does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lunged forward contacting the front gate as the start was effected.
Came under pressure rounding the home turn and gave ground.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently ran on from midfield and won by 1.2 len at this track March 15 over 1300m defeating Saxon Jewel with 57kg at $6.50. The race before that ran on strongly from last on the turn and won by a head at this track March 2 over 1200m defeating King Brew carrying 55kg at $3.40. No reason why she can't bring up the hat-trick today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently ran on from midfield and won by 1.2 len at this track March 15 over 1300m defeating Saxon Jewel with 57kg at $6.50. The race before that ran on strongly from last on the turn and won by a head at this track March 2 over 1200m defeating King Brew carrying 55kg at $3.40. No reason why she can't bring up the hat-trick today.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation tenth of 12 at Pinjarra Cl3 December 26 over 1200m, 6 len behind Ma Ma Belle with 53kg at $51. Previously first up; third of 9 at Moora Rtg 64+ October 4 over 1190m, 7 len behind Teabiscuit carrying 53kg at $21. Others have firmer winning claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Resuming. Finished off last preparation tenth of 12 at Pinjarra Cl3 December 26 over 1200m, 6 len behind Ma Ma Belle with 53kg at $51. Previously first up; third of 9 at Moora Rtg 64+ October 4 over 1190m, 7 len behind Teabiscuit carrying 53kg at $21. Others have firmer winning claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up from on straightening until near the 200m.
Raced tight and eased near the 700m.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 25 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Acorn with 56kg at $21. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.3 len at Albany Mdn March 8 over 1100m on a rain affected track defeating A Lot Of Montey carrying 55kg at $8.50. Has been racing well. Can return to winning ways.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 8 at this track on March 15 over 1100m, nose behind Scream carrying 56.5kg at $8. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Good Vibes with 54kg at $51. Looks tested in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide throughout. Shifted ground when under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 8 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Acorn carrying 56kg at $151. Before that 6th of 11 at Geraldton Cl2 on January 23 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Lim's Sarbach carrying 56.5kg at $13. Doesn't shape as a major player.
